creator: mdh@logcabin.woods.bridge.com
text:
When booting from CD-ROM and going to the fixit section, when you select
to use the 2nd CD-ROM, get the following error message:

Fatal: The FreeBSD install CD currently in the drive
is for the alpha architecture, not the machine you're using.

Please use the correct installation CD for your machine type.

How-To-Repeat: Boot off the 3.2 install CD-ROM.  Try to use the fixit option and
select 1.
